calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For Request For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Diverse Education Resources, LLC, Defendant Phillip P. Deats, Defendant Leslie Swanson and Defendant Kelli Denise Deats.

Dept.505; Judge: Anne Costin; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:41:27 a.m. and concluding at 9:50:48 a.m. (D505)

Catherine Robertson, Esq. representing Plaintiff Rev Capital (California) Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Diverse Education Resources, LLC, Defendant Phillip P. Deats, Defendant Leslie Swanson and Defendant Kelli Denise Deats not appearing.
Fahad Ali, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract filed Jul-27-2023.
Proof of personal service filed as to Defendant Diverse Education Resources, LLC, and Defendant Kelli Denise Deats on August 15, 2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Phillip P. Deats on August 31,2023; effectuated on September 11, 2023.

Proof of substituted service on Defendant Leslie Swanson on Oct-12-2023; effectuated on Oct-23-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Phillip P. Deats on October 13, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Diverse Education Resources, LLC, and Defendant Kelli Denise Deats on November 21,2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Leslie Swanson on December 14, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Does 1 through 20, inclusive on November 7, 2023.

The court reviews the documents filed with counsel.
Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to offer proof as to witness testimony.
The Court accepts the exhibits filed as evidence.
Witness is called to testify. The Court examines the witness. Witness testifies.
The court reviews the proposed judgment and comports to proof.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS judgment and rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:

Damages $123,574.94
Factoring Fees $6,430.88
Attorney's Fees $21,140.27
Costs $1,740.00
Late Fees $66,276.20

Total Judgment $219,162.29

Proposed judgment is signed as modified by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice (Other) (Notices)
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Continued To Feb-28-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
